category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a CLI app for checking the state of git repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the project name cig.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/stevenjack/cig; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies git repository state checking; source_facts.executables lists a CLI executable.
